case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. DAD'S BAIL BOND

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. DAD'S BAIL BOND $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,583.00, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. DAD'S BAIL BOND
REIMBURSEMENT FROM BOND FOR FILING FEE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
